title: Full Body Express
description: 3-round circuit with jump squats, push-ups, plank and lunges for an intense full body

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate cat and cow, breathe

exercises.name: Moderate high knees
exercises.instructions: Knees to chest at a moderate pace

exercises.name: Sumo squats
exercises.instructions: Feet very wide, toes pointed out

exercises.name: Diamond push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands together under the chest, elbows close to the body

exercises.name: Reverse lunges
exercises.instructions: Big step backward, lower the knee

exercises.name: RKC plank
exercises.instructions: Plank with max contraction, clench fists and glutes

exercises.name: Burpees no push-up
exercises.instructions: Drop down, jump feet back, come back, jump up

exercises.name: Glute bridge
exercises.instructions: Like a hip thrust but back on the floor, drive hips up

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Kneeling, arms extended forward, forehead on the floor, breathe deeply
